_comment_jam: AT URI + CID printed by create-eptss-jam.ts. Same values for every round under this jam.
name: Round 27
assignment: Record your cover of the chosen song by the submission deadline. Any arrangement, any instrumentation — make it yours.
_comment_song: Inlined as round.subject. $type lets future readers (atjam.site, EPTSS UI) discriminate.
_comment_milestones: Labels in kebab-case match at.atjam.round knownValues. Dates in ISO 8601 UTC.
_comment_acceptedSubmissionTypes: Placeholder — audio payload decision is still open (see docs/atproto-migration/README.md decision #7). The field needs >=1 NSID for the record to validate; nothing downstream consumes it until submission flow is built.
